subject: Add dependency libssl for Ubuntu 20.04
commit_message:
Add dependency libssl for Ubuntu 20.04

Needed as dependency of Erlang

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Change-Id: I32debebfacf62d9df59bc501af569524f2ebece1
